search.query: | `format_ip_column(src_ip_string, src_ip, src_host)` | `format_ip_column(dest_ip_string, dest_ip, dest_host)` | strcat src_ip_string " - " dest_ip_string host_pair | search [ | `tstats_20062_traffic_complete("$exp_ip$","$nfo_hostname$","$advanced_filter$","$exp_group$","$src_ip$","$src_port$","$dest_ip$","$dest_port$","$protocol_name$","$span_token$")` | stats avg(avg_duration) as avgduration by nfo_hostname exp_ip flow_type transport src_ip src_port src_host dest_ip dest_port dest_host | sort 10 by - avgduration | `format_ip_column(src_ip_string, src_ip, src_host)` | `format_ip_column(dest_ip_string, dest_ip, dest_host)` | strcat src_ip_string " - " dest_ip_string host_pair | table host_pair ] | timechart limit=10 $span_token$ avg(avg_duration) by host_pair useother="false"

| stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sndbytes sum(sum_bytes_out) as rcvbytes sum(sum_packets_in) as sndpackets sum(sum_packets_out) as rcvpackets sum(sum_flow_count) as "Connections" avg(avg_duration) as avgduration by nfo_hostname exp_ip flow_type transport src_ip src_port src_host dest_ip dest_port dest_host | eval "Bytes Rcvd/Sent %"=round((rcvbytes/sndbytes)*100,2) | eval "Packets Rcvd/Sent %"=round((rcvpackets/sndpackets)*100,2) | eval sndmegabytes = sndbytes/1024/1024 | eval rcvmegabytes =rcvbytes/1024/1024 | sort 0 by - avgduration | `commas_formatting(MB Sent, sndmegabytes,2)` | `commas_formatting(MB Received, rcvmegabytes,2)` | `commas_formatting(Packets Sent, sndpackets)` | `commas_formatting(Packets Received, rcvpackets)` | `commas_formatting(Avg Duration, avgduration,2)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `format_port_column(src_port, src_port)` | `format_port_column(dest_port, dest_port)` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name flow_type transport src_ip src_port src_host dest_ip dest_port dest_host "MB Sent" "MB Received" "Bytes Rcvd/Sent %" "Packets Sent" "Packets Received" "Packets Rcvd/Sent %" "Connections" "Avg Duration" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename flow_type as "Flow Type" | rename transport as "Protocol" | rename src_ip as "Source IP" | rename src_port as "Source Port" | rename src_host as "Source Host" | rename dest_ip as "Dest IP" | rename dest_port as "Dest Port" | rename dest_host as "Dest Host"

| `tstats_20062_traffic_complete("$exp_ip$","$nfo_hostname$","$advanced_filter$","$exp_group$","$src_ip$","$src_port$","$dest_ip$","$dest_port$","$protocol_name$","$span_token$")` | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sndbytes sum(sum_bytes_out) as rcvbytes sum(sum_packets_in) as sndpackets sum(sum_packets_out) as rcvpackets sum(sum_flow_count) as "Connections" avg(avg_duration) as avgduration by nfo_hostname exp_ip flow_type transport src_ip src_port src_host dest_ip dest_port dest_host | eval "Bytes Rcvd/Sent %"=round((rcvbytes/sndbytes)*100,2) | eval "Packets Rcvd/Sent %"=round((rcvpackets/sndpackets)*100,2) | eval sndmegabytes = sndbytes/1024/1024 | eval rcvmegabytes =rcvbytes/1024/1024 | sort 0 by - avgduration | `commas_formatting(MB Sent, sndmegabytes,2)` | `commas_formatting(MB Received, rcvmegabytes,2)` | `commas_formatting(Packets Sent, sndpackets)` | `commas_formatting(Packets Received, rcvpackets)` | `commas_formatting(Avg Duration, avgduration,2)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `format_port_column(src_port, src_port)` | `format_port_column(dest_port, dest_port)` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name flow_type transport src_ip src_port src_host dest_ip dest_port dest_host "MB Sent" "MB Received" "Bytes Rcvd/Sent %" "Packets Sent" "Packets Received" "Packets Rcvd/Sent %" "Connections" "Avg Duration" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename flow_type as "Flow Type" | rename transport as "Protocol" | rename src_ip as "Source IP" | rename src_port as "Source Port" | rename src_host as "Source Host" | rename dest_ip as "Dest IP" | rename dest_port as "Dest Port" | rename dest_host as "Dest Host"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10062: Network Conversations” (syslogs with nfc_id=20062). This Module identifies and reports hosts with the most traffic (optionally all hosts). It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. For bidirectional flows the Module stitches request-reply flows inverting source and destination for flows in the opposite direction. It reports consolidated flows separating bytes/packets sent and bytes/packets received.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
